result.stderr:
GraphQL.SDLExporter 0.0.24+60e37ed01dd66407fe48d3d0df5baacba9d8f676
Copyright © Maximov Ivan 2019-2023
USAGE:
Generating SDL from an executable file:
  GraphQL.SDLExporter --api-path /api/graphql --include-descriptions --out
  D:\MySchema.graphql --source C:\MyFiles\MyService.dll --timeout 10 --url
  http://localhost:5000
Generating SDL from URL:
  GraphQL.SDLExporter --auth bearer|04b8b7cddb76df2bf353d23ccc1fcaf85ca132ec
  --include-descriptions --out D:\github.graphql --source
  https://api.github.com/graphql --verbose

  --introspection-file      Allows you to specify a file with your own
                            introspection query

  --verbose                 Enables verbose log output

  --source                  Required. Schema source - executable file or URL

  --url                     (Default: http://localhost:8088) URL to start
                            process

  --args                    Additional command line arguments in case of using
                            the executable file

  --api-path                (Default: /graphql) Relative path for GraphQL API
                            when using --url option

  --auth                    Authentication method in schema|parameter format

  --out                     The output SDL file. If not specified, then the
                            schema will be saved as <Source>.graphql

  --include-descriptions    Include descriptions as comments in output file

  --timeout                 Timeout in seconds for generating SDL; 0 - no
                            timeout

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.
